Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a DuckDB SQL query that returns all events from event_log except those cases that contain the sequence Approve Purchase Requisition Create Order Confirm Order with no other events in between and where time difference between Create Order and Confirm Order more than 5 days

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to identify such case_ids then exclude them

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Approach Use window functions to order events per case by timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then for each event compute next two activities We can use lag lead or row_number partitioned by case_id order by timestamp Then we can identify rows where activity Approve Purchase Requisition next activity Create Order next2 activity Confirm Order Also ensure no other event in between since we are using consecutive rows thats satisfied

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then compute time difference between Create Order and Confirm Order we need timestamps of those two events

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Simpler Use CTE to get candidate sequences

Name: Validation - IND
Text: But we also need to ensure that there is no other event in between using consecutive leads ensures that

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However we used only one row per sequence start but if there are multiple sequences per case each will be captured separately

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now final query Exclude these cases

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But note that seq uses alias for activity We didnt include original activity column we should include it Lets rewrite

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Wait easier just compute candidate cases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Need to cast date_diff properly DuckDBs date_diff function signature is date_diff unit date1 date2 So use date_diff day ts2 ts3 Ensure ts values not null

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also ensure ordering by timestamp within partition ensures consecutive events

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Edge cases If there are duplicate timestamps But fine
